# toolshed
> Universal software directory with 15954 entries across 123 categories. Structured data for AI agents and developers.

## Endpoints
- Full catalog (JSON): /api/v1/catalog.json
- Categories with counts: /api/v1/categories.json
- Entry schema: /schema.json
- Full text catalog: /llms-full.txt
- Human browsable: /

## Entry Schema
{ id, name, description, url, category, os[], pricing, tags[], source?, language?, triage? }

## Triage (ideas only)
Ideas (status: idea/in-progress) have a triage object: { impact: high|medium|low, buildability: straightforward|moderate|hard, alternatives: none|partial|covered, alternatives_note: string }
Filter out covered, sort by impact desc then buildability asc.

Pricing: free | freemium | paid | subscription
OS: windows | macos | linux | web | ios | android

## Querying
Download /api/v1/catalog.json and filter by:
- category: exact match on category field
- os: check if desired OS is in the os[] array
- pricing: exact match (free, freemium, paid, subscription)
- tags: check if desired tag is in tags[] array
- language: filter libraries by ecosystem (python, rust, go, javascript, etc.)
- status: idea (unfulfilled request), submitted (built by AI forge), or absent (existing software)
- text search: match against name, description, tags

## Example Queries
- "Find free image editors for Linux": filter pricing=free, os contains "linux", category="Image Editors"
- "Python HTTP libraries": filter language="python", category="HTTP Libraries"
- "All database tools": filter category in ["Databases", "Database Tools", "ORMs"]
